changes.description: Added FTS5 virtual table creation, rebuild_fts() method, and search() method with BM25 ranking
Added docstring field to SymbolInfo dataclass and extraction via ast.get_docstring()
Passed docstring to content field when creating GraphNode
Added search() API method to ContextGraph and rebuild_fts() call in index pipeline
Added graph-search CLI subcommand with human-readable and --json output, --limit flag
Added 9 FTS search tests covering BM25 ranking, stemming, cleanup, and edge cases
Added 6 tests for docstring extraction, FTS integration, and ContextGraph.search() API
Added 5 tests for graph-search CLI subcommand
